properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11 v12 v13 v14 v15 v16 v17

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We've seen what You can do Oh, God of wonders Your power has no end The things You've done before In greater measure You will do again

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: 'Cause there's no prison wall You can't break through No mountain You can't move All things are possible There's no broken body You can't raise No soul that You can't save All things are possible

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The darkest night You can light it up You can light it up God of revival Let hope arise Death is overcome You've already won God of revival

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You rose in victory And now You're seated Forever on the throne So why should my heart fear What You've defeated? I will trust in You alone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: 'Cause there's no prison wall You can't break through No, mountain You can't move All things are possible There's no broken body you can't raise No, soul that You can't save All things are possible

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: The darkest night You can light it up You can light it up Oh, God of revival Let hope arise Death is overcome You've already won Oh, God of revival God of revival

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: We're gonna turn this into a prayer tonight Over our nation, over our cities

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Come awaken Your people Come awaken Your city Oh God of revival, pour it out, pour it out Every stronghold will crumble Hear the chains hit the ground Oh God of revival, pour it out, pour it out

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: Come awaken Your people Come awaken Your city Oh God of revival, pour it out, pour it out Every stronghold will crumble I hear the chains hit the ground Oh God of revival, pour it out, pour it out

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: The darkest night You can light it up You can light it up Oh, God of revival Let hope arise Death is overcome You've already won God of revival Oh God of revival

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: Come awaken Your people Come awaken Your city Oh God of revival, pour it out, pour it out Every stronghold will crumble I hear the chains hit the ground Oh, God of revival, pour it out, pour it out

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: Come awaken Your people Come awaken Your city Oh, God of revival, pour it out, pour it out Every stronghold will crumble Hear the chains hit the ground Oh, God of revival, pour it out, pour it out

verse.name: v13
verse.lines: Oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh God of revival (Start to raise your voice)

verse.name: v14
verse.lines: Oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh God of revival (Fan the flame afresh in me, God) Oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh Oh, God of revival (Revive me tonight, God)

verse.name: v15
verse.lines: Oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh God of revival (Fan the flame) Oh, oh-oh-oh, oh-oh-oh God of revival

verse.name: v16
verse.lines: Come awaken Your people Come awaken Your city Oh, God of revival, pour it out, pour it out Every stronghold will crumble I hear the chains hit the ground Oh, God of revival, pour it out, pour it out

verse.name: v17
verse.lines: There's no prison wall You can't break through No, mountain You can't move All things are possible There's no broken body you can't raise No, soul that You can't save All things are possible All things are possible
